title: Zero To Lend
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by withdrawal with compromised collateral on lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that borrows LBTC and immediately withdraws using PT-LBTC as collateral
prevention.trigger: FLASHLOAN_BORROW -> WITHDRAW with PT-LBTC collateral in single tx

monitoring_rules: BLOCK ANY TX THAT CALLS WITHDRAW() WITH PT-LBTC AS COLLATERAL IMMEDIATELY AFTER A FLASHLOAN_BORROW IN THE SAME TX
summary: A single wallet borrowed LBTC via a flash loan, used PT-LBTC as collateral, and withdrew the borrowed funds, leaving behind worthless PT-LBTC. This attack could have been detected by monitoring for flash loans followed by withdrawals with PT-LBTC.
